hooks.command: cd /Users/sunguk/0.code/spamcall2 && [ ! -f project.yml ] && echo 'SKIP: project.yml 없음 — 빌드 검증 생략' && exit 0 || xcodegen generate 2>&1 && xcodebuild build -project SpamCall070.xcodeproj -scheme SpamCall070 -destination 'generic/platform=iOS' CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO 2>&1
if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE 'rm\s+-rf|git\s+push\s+--force|git\s+reset\s+--hard|DROP\s+TABLE'; then echo 'BLOCKED: 위험한 명령어가 감지되었습니다.' >&2; exit 1; fi
